name: 60"x84" Floral Tablecloth - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Modern Rectangle, Cotton, Botanical, Spring Decor
description:
Make your dining space look more inviting with this Floral Tablecloth from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This rectangular tablecloth features a distressed floral print in white on a green background along the hem for eye-catching flair. Made from 100% slub cotton, it helps protect your dining table from spills, messes or scratches. Best of all, you can toss it in the washing machine for easy care.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
